title: taverniera oligantha
intro: Taverniera oligantha, also known as Indian spurge or tiger's claw, is a plant species in the family Asclepiadaceae. It is traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antibacterial effects. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating skin conditions like eczema and acne, and aiding in the management of diabetes. Taverniera oligantha can be prepared as a decoction or tincture, and is often used in herbal remedies to promote overall health and well-being.
